headline: Walmart makes big move into beauty to rival Target
summary: When you think of a store that's loaded with cosmetics and beauty products, your mind doesn't necessarily land on Walmart. And that's reasonable. Walmart may be the perfect place to buy cheap sneakers, underwear, and cleaning supplies. But it's probably not the first store on your list if you're ...
